subject: hope you get this
body:
Hi J 



?? I am not sure if you can receive email or if you have someone checking for you? I tried to see you last week when I was in Florida twice... But I was told you have a strict list to the visitors allowed. Anyway I saw a friend of yours at the jail and she said she would tell you I tried to stop by. I hope you are doing OK with all that? has happened. You know before I went a had this image in my mind of all these beautiful girls waiting in line to see you and that was pretty much how it was with a VIP list to boot. Only you :) Well if you do get this please know you are in my thoughts and if there is Anything I can do for you I will. I will be back in FL on Friday as I am trying to relocate there .I would love the chance to visit with you but I know the circumstances are not well but if by some crazy chance you want another old friend to visit with you please just have someone contact me. Lots of Love 



████████ 

PS Ohio ███████? haha
